description: Create a Warren truss elevation drawing for a 12-meter span pedestrian bridge in LibreCAD. The truss must feature a 12000 mm span and 2000 mm height with 6 panels in a 'W' pattern. Organize the drawing using the following layers: 'Chords' (Red/Color 1), 'Webs' (Green/Color 3), 'Dimensions' (Cyan/Color 4), and 'Labels' (White/Color 7). Include dimensions for the span and height, the title 'WARREN TRUSS ELEVATION', scale 'SCALE 1:100', and support labels 'PIN' (left) and 'ROLLER' (right). Draw a triangle symbol for a Pin support at (0,0) and a triangle with a circle for a Roller support at (12000,0) on the 'Webs' layer. Save the completed drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/truss_elevation.dxf.
